name: ClawVault
description: Structured memory system for AI agents with context death resilience

vaultPath.description: Path to the ClawVault vault directory. Used as fallback when agentVaults is not set or agent not found.

agentVaults.description: Mapping of agent names to vault paths. Allows each agent to have its own vault. Falls back to vaultPath if agent not found.

additionalProperties.description: Path to the vault directory for this agent

allowClawvaultExec.description: Security gate for all child_process execution from the plugin. Must be true to run clawvault CLI commands.

clawvaultBinaryPath.description: Optional absolute path to the clawvault executable. When omitted, the plugin resolves clawvault from PATH.

clawvaultBinarySha256.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum for clawvaultBinaryPath (or resolved clawvault executable) to enforce binary integrity verification.

allowEnvAccess.description: Allow reading OPENCLAW_* and CLAWVAULT_PATH environment variables for vault and agent discovery.

enableStartupRecovery.description: Enable recovery checks on gateway startup.

enableSessionContextInjection.description: Enable recap/context injection on session start.

enableHeartbeatObservation.description: Enable observation threshold checks on heartbeat.

enableCompactionObservation.description: Enable forced observer flush on compaction events.

enableWeeklyReflection.description: Enable weekly reflection on Sunday midnight UTC.

enableFactExtraction.description: Enable extraction of structured facts from observed text during hook events.

contextProfile.description: Default context profile for session start injection

maxContextResults.description: Maximum number of context results to inject on session start

enableBeforePromptRecall.description: Enable before_prompt_build memory recall directives and vault context injection.

enableMessageSendingFilter.description: Enable outbound message filtering via message_sending hook.

enforceCommunicationProtocol.description: Append communication protocol rules to system context and enforce rewrites.

minQuestionRecallScore.description: Minimum memory_search score used when checking outbound questions for existing answers.

vaultPath.label: Vault Path
vaultPath.description: Path to your ClawVault memory vault (fallback when agentVaults not set)

allowClawvaultExec.label: Allow CLI Execution
allowClawvaultExec.description: Required opt-in to run child_process calls from the plugin.

clawvaultBinaryPath.label: ClawVault Binary Path
clawvaultBinaryPath.description: Absolute path to clawvault executable for stricter execution controls.

clawvaultBinarySha256.label: ClawVault Binary SHA-256
clawvaultBinarySha256.description: Optional checksum to verify executable integrity before execution.

allowEnvAccess.label: Allow Environment Access
allowEnvAccess.description: Allow OPENCLAW_* and CLAWVAULT_PATH reads for fallback discovery.

enableStartupRecovery.label: Startup Recovery
enableStartupRecovery.description: Run recovery checks on gateway startup.

enableSessionContextInjection.label: Session Context Injection
enableSessionContextInjection.description: Inject recap and memory context on session start.

enableHeartbeatObservation.label: Observe On Heartbeat
enableHeartbeatObservation.description: Check observation thresholds during heartbeat events.

enableCompactionObservation.label: Observe On Compaction
enableCompactionObservation.description: Force observer flush during compaction events.

enableWeeklyReflection.label: Weekly Reflection
enableWeeklyReflection.description: Run weekly reflection on Sunday midnight UTC.

enableFactExtraction.label: Fact Extraction
enableFactExtraction.description: Extract structured facts from hook event payloads.

contextProfile.label: Context Profile
contextProfile.description: Profile used for context injection at session start

maxContextResults.label: Max Context Results
maxContextResults.description: Number of vault memories to inject

enableBeforePromptRecall.label: Enable Before Prompt Recall
enableBeforePromptRecall.description: Use before_prompt_build to force memory recall and inject vault context.

enableMessageSendingFilter.label: Enable Message Sending Filter
enableMessageSendingFilter.description: Use message_sending to rewrite or block protocol violations.

enforceCommunicationProtocol.label: Enforce Communication Protocol
enforceCommunicationProtocol.description: Append protocol rules to system context and enforce banned-pattern rewrites.

minQuestionRecallScore.label: Min Question Recall Score
minQuestionRecallScore.description: Score threshold when deciding if outbound questions are already answered by memory.
